prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTWBPSWAT-9PC-STD-RD-PZ-AMZ Product Type: SOLDERING_IRON Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Beginner Pyrography Wood Burning Pen Kit 9pc Basic Starter Tool Set, Easy Craft Engraving Burner for DIY Projects and Hobby Use Description: Discover a creative new way to personalize wood, leather, and DIY craft projects with this complete wood burning pen and soldering tool set. Designed as a starter pyrography wood burning kit, beginners typically look for tools that feel safe, easy to control, and versatile enough to learn multiple techniques. Here are the key features that make a beginner set stand out stable heat performance, easy-to-use interchangeable tips, and beginner-friendly accessories that help you achieve clean, professional-looking results from the very first project.

The included wood burning pen delivers consistent, controlled heat to help create smooth lines, detailed shading, lettering, and decorative engraving without damaging surfaces. Multiple interchangeable tips allow you to experiment with writing, outlining, embossing, and light soldering tasks, making this kit ideal for woodworking, pyrography art, crafting, leather embossing, home decor personalization, and hobby projects. Letter and number stencils, symbol stamps, and a hot knife attachment provide added versatility so new users can learn faster while experienced makers enjoy expanded creative freedom.

Built for comfort and reliability, this versatile wood burning kit combines beginner-friendly performance with practical functionality. Whether you're upgrading your workshop tools, starting a new crafting hobby, or adding detailed finishing touches to woodworking projects, this all-in-one pyrography set delivers the precision, control, and flexibility needed to bring your creative ideas to life. Search Terms: beginner wood burning kit cheap wood burner starter pyrography kit basic wood burning pen diy craft burner easy wood burning tool hobby wood burner entry level wood burner beginner engraving tool wood burning kit for beginners leather burning beginner kit affordable wood burner Features: - BEGINNER-FRIENDLY WOOD BURNING KIT WITH STENCILS & ACCESSORIES: Create clean lettering, numbers, and decorative designs right away using included letter & number stencils; Perfect starter pyrography kit for DIY crafts, woodworking projects, and creative hobbies - STABLE HEAT FOR SMOOTH, CONTROLLED WOOD BURNING: Consistent temperature output helps beginners achieve clean lines, detailed shading, and precise engraving without over-burning the surface. Ideal for wood burning art, leather embossing, crafting, and light soldering applications - EASY TO LEARN & CONTROL: Our wood burning pen provides a well balanced heat output that allows new users to practice outlining, shading, and calligraphy techniques with confidence while maintaining excellent control on wood, cork, and craft materials - VERSATILE INTERCHANGEABLE TIPS FOR ENDLESS CREATIVITY: Includes writing tips, shading tips, universal burner tips, stencil stamping heads, and specialty attachments to expand your woodworking, pyrography, engraving, and DIY crafting capabilities without overwhelming new users - One Pen + 6 Interchangeable Tips - 2pc Brass Wood Burning Tips - 2pc Steel Soldering Tips - 1pc Steel Chiseled Tip - 1pc Hot Blade withChuck - Soldering Stand Included - 25 Watts, 110-120V - UL Approved === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 9pc Wood Burning Pen Kit Beginner Pyrography
